boxfitting: FX BOXFITTING. Apply box fitting effect on selected images, as displayed the web page
cartoon: FX CARTOON. Apply cartoon effect on selected images.
color_ellipses: FX COLOR ELLIPSES. Add random color ellipses to selected images.
cubism: FX CUBISM. Apply cubism effect on selected images.
draw_whirl: FX DRAW WHIRL. Apply whirl drawing effect on selected images.
drop_shadow: FX DROP SHADOW. Drop shadow behind selected images. => expand_size: 0=No,1=Yes => output_separate_layers: 0=No,1=Yes
ellipsionism: FX ELLIPSIONISM. Apply ellipsionism filter to selected images.
fire_edges: FX FIRE EDGES. Generate fire effect from edges of selected images.
fractalize: FX FRACTALIZE. Randomly fractalize selected images.
glow: FX GLOW. Add soft glow on selected images.
halftone: FX HALFTONE. Apply halftone dithering to selected images. => shape: 0=Square,1=Diamond,2=Circle,3=inv-square,4=inv-diamond,5=inv-circle
hardsketchbw: FX HARDSKETCHBW. Apply hard B&W sketch effect on selected images. => is_fast: 0=No,1=Yes
hearts: FX HEARTS. Apply heart effect on selected images.
houghsketchbw: FX HOUGHSKETCHBW. Apply hough B&W sketch effect on selected images.
lightrays: FX LIGHTRAYS. Generate ray lights from the edges of selected images.
light_relief: FX LIGHT RELIEF. Apply relief light to selected images. => opacity_is_heightmap: 0=No,1=Yes;
mosaic: FX MOSAIC. Create random mosaic from selected images.
old_photo: FX OLD PHOTO. Apply old photo effect on selected images.
pencilbw: FX PENCIL BW. Apply B&W pencil effect on selected images.
pixelsort: FX PIXELSORT. Apply a pixel sorting algorithm on selected images. => ordering: 0=Increasing,1=Decreasing; => axis: 0=x,1=y,2=z,3=xy;4=yx;
polaroid: FX POLAROID. Create polaroid effect in selected images.
polygonize: FX POLYGONIZE. Apply polygon effect on selected images.
poster_edges: FX POSTER EDGES. Apply poster edges effect on selected images.
poster_hope: FX POSTER HOPE. Apply Hope stencil poster effect on selected images.
rodilius: FX RODILIUS. Apply rodilius (fractalius-like) filter on selected images. => color_mode: 0=Darker,1=Brighter;
sketchbw: FX SKETCH BW. Apply sketch effect to selected images.
sponge: FX SPONGE. Apply sponge effect on selected images.
stained_glass: FX STAINED GLASS. Generate stained glass from selected images.
stars: FX STARS. Add random stars to selected images.
stencil: FX STENCIL. Apply stencil filter on selected images.
stencilbw: FX STENCIL BW. Apply B&W stencil effect on selected images.
tetris: FX TETRIS. Apply tetris effect on selected images.
warhol: FX WARHOL. Create MxN Andy Warhol-like artwork from selected images.
weave: FX WEAVE. Apply weave effect to the selected images. => angle: 0=0deg,1=22.5deg,2=45deg,3=67.5deg;
whirls: FX WHIRLS. Add random whirl texture to selected images.
cracks: FX CRACKS. Draw random cracks on selected images with specified color. => is_relief: 0=No, 1=Yes;
light_patch: FX LIGHT PATCH. Add light patches to selected images.
pixelize: FX PIXELIZE. Pixelize selected images with specified scales.
scanlines: FX SCANLINES. Apply ripple deformation on selected images. => scanlines: 0=Block, 1=Triangle, 2=Sine, 3=Sine+, 4=Random;
shade_stripes: FX SHADE STRIPES. Add shade stripes to selected images. => direction: 0=Horizontal, 1=Vertical;
shadow_patch: FX SHADOW PATCH. Add shadow patches to selected images.
spread: FX SPREAD. Spread pixel values of selected images randomly along x,y and z.
stripes_y: FX STRIPES Y. Add vertical stripes to selected images.
texturize_canvas: FX TEXTURE CANVAS. Add paint canvas texture to selected images.
texturize_paper: FX TEXTURIZE PAPER. Add paper texture to selected images.
vignette: FX VIGNETTE. Add vignette effect to selected images.
watermark_visible: FX WATERMARK VISIBLE. Add or remove a visible watermark on selected images. => mode: 0=Remove, 1=Add;
area: FX AREA. Compute area of connected components in selected images. => is_high_connectivity: 0=No, 1=Yes;
area_fg: FX AREA FG. Compute area of connected components for non-zero values in selected images. Similar to area except that 0-valued pixels are not considered. => is_high_connectivity: 0=No, 1=Yes;
at_curve: FX AT CURVE. Retrieve pixels of the selected images belonging to the specified cubic spline curve that passes across the specified points.
at_quadrangle: FX AT QUADRANGLE. Retrieve pixels of the selected images belonging to the specified 2D or 3D quadrangle. => interpolation: 0=Nearest-neighbor, 1=Linear, 2=Cubic; => boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
canny: FX CANNY. Locate image edges using Canny edge detector.
edges: FX EDGES. Estimate contours of selected images.
fftpolar: FX FFTPOLAR. Compute fourier transform of selected images, as centered magnitude/phase images.
isophotes: FX ISOPHOTES. Render isophotes of selected images on a transparent background.
max_patch: FX MAX_PATCH. Return locations of maximal values in local patch-based neighborhood of given size for selected images.
min_patch: FX MIN_PATCH. Return locations of minimal values in local patch-based neighborhood of given size for selected images.
patches2img: FX PATCHES TO IMG. Recompose 2D images from their selected patch representations.
segment_watershed: FX SEGMENT WATERSHED. Apply watershed segmentation on selected images.
slic: FX SLIC. Segment selected 2D images with superpixels, using the SLIC algorithm (Simple Linear Iterative Clustering).
tones: FX TONES. Get N tones masks from selected images.
topographic_map: FX TOPOGRAPHIC MAP. Render selected images as topographic maps.
variance_patch: FX VARIANCE PATCH. Compute variance of each images patch centered at (x,y), in selected images
bandpass: FX BANDPASS. Apply bandpass filter to selected images.
bilateral: BILATERAL. Blur selected images by anisotropic (eventually joint/cross) bilateral filtering.
blur: FX BLUR. Blur selected images by a Deriche or gaussian filter (recursive implementation)
blur_angular: FX BLUR ANGULAR. Apply angular blur on selected images.
blur_bloom:
FX BLUR BLOOM. Apply a bloom filter that blend multiple blur filters of different radii,
resulting in a larger but sharper glare than a simple blur.
blur_linear: FX BLUR LINEAR. Apply linear blur on selected images, with specified angle and amplitudes.
blur_radial: FX BLUR RADIAL. Apply radial blur on selected images.
blur_selective: FX BLUR SELECTIVE. Blur selected images using selective gaussian scales.
boxfilter: FX BOXFILTER. Apply box filter to selected images.
closing: FX CLOSING. Apply morphological closing to selected images.
closing_circ: FX CLOSING CIRC. Apply circular dilation of selected images by specified size.
curvature: FX CURVATURE. Compute isophote curvatures on selected images.
deriche:
FX DERICHE Apply Deriche recursive filter on selected images, along specified axis and with
specified standard deviation, order and boundary conditions.
dilate: FX DILATE. Dilate selected images by a rectangular or the specified structuring element.
dilate_circ: FX DILATE CIRC. Apply circular dilation of selected images by specified size.
dilate_oct: FX DILATE OCT. Apply octagonal dilation of selected images by specified size.
dilate_threshold: FX DILATE THRESHOLD. Dilate selected images in the (X,Y,Z,I) space.
divergence: FX DIVERGENCE.Compute divergence of selected vector fields.
diffusiontensors: FX DIFFUSIONTENSORS. Compute the diffusion tensors of selected images for edge-preserving smoothing algorithms.
dog: FX DOG. Compute difference of gaussian on selected images.
erode: FX ERODE Erode selected images by a rectangular or the specified structuring element.
erode_circ: FX ERODE CIRC. Apply circular erosion of selected images by specified size.
erode_oct: FX ERODE OCT. Apply octagonal erosion of selected images by specified size.
erode_threshold: FX ERODE THRESHOLD. Erode selected images in the (X,Y,Z,I) space.
gradient: FX GRADIENT. Compute the gradient components (first derivatives) of selected images, along specified axes. (no arg) compute all significant components.
gradient_norm: GX GRADIENT NORM. Compute the gradient norm of selected images.
gradient_orientation: FX GRADIENT ORIENTATION. Compute N-d gradient orientation of selected images.
guided: FX GUIDED. Blur selected images by guided image filtering.
haar: FX HAAR. Compute the direct haar multiscale wavelet transform of selected images.
heat_flow: FX HEAT FLOW. Apply iterations of the heat flow on selected images.
hessian: FX HESSIAN. Compute the hessian components (second derivatives) of selected images along specified axes. (no arg) compute all significant components.
iee: FX IEE. Compute gradient-orthogonal-directed 2nd derivative of image(s).
ifft: FX IFFT. Compute the inverse fourier transform (real and imaginary parts) of selected images. optionally along the specified axes only.
ihaar: FX IHAAR. Compute the inverse haar multiscale wavelet transform of selected images.
ilaplacian:
FX ILAPLACIAN. Invert selected Laplacian images. If given nb_iterations is 0, inversion is done in Fourier space (single iteration),
otherwise, by applying nb_iterations of a Laplacian-inversion PDE flow.
Note that the resulting inversions are just estimation of possible/approximated solutions.
inn: FX INN.Compute gradient-directed 2nd derivative of image(s).
inpaint:
FX INPAINT. Inpaint selected images by specified mask. If no patch size (or 0) is specified, inpainting is done using a fast average or median algorithm.
Otherwise, it used a patch-based reconstruction method, that can be very time consuming.
inpaint_holes: FX INPAINT HOLES. Inpaint all connected regions having an area less than specified value.
kuwahara: FX KUWAHARA. Apply Kuwahara filter of specified size on selected images.
laplacian: FX LAPLACIAN. Compute Laplacian of selected images.
map_tones: FX MAP TONES. Apply tone mapping operator on selected images, based on Poisson equation.
map_tones_fast: FX MAP TONES FAST. Apply fast tone mapping operator on selected images.
meancurvature_flow: FX MEANCURVATURE FLOW. Apply iterations of the mean curvature flow on selected images.
median: FX MEDIAN. Apply (opt. thresholded) median filter on selected images with structuring element size x size.
normalize_local: FX NORMALIZE LOCAL. Normalize selected images locally.
opening: FX OPENING. Apply morphological opening to selected images.
opening_circ: FX OPENING CIRCL. Apply circular opening of selected images by specified size.
peronamalik_flow: FX PERONAMALIK FLOW. Apply iterations of the Perona-Malik flow on selected images.
pde_flow: FX PDE FLOW. Apply iterations of a generic PDE flow on selected images.
periodize_poisson: FX PERIODIZE POISSION. Periodize selected images using a Poisson solver in Fourier space.
remove_pixels: FX REMOVE PIXELS. Remove specified number of pixels (i.e. set them to 0) from the set of non-zero pixels in selected images.
rolling_guidance: FX ROLLING GUIDANCE. Apply the rolling guidance filter on selected image.
sharpen: FX SHARPEN. Sharpen selected images by inverse diffusion or shock filters methods.
sharpen_alpha: FX SHARPEN ALPHA. Sharpen selected images using a multi-scale and alpha boosting algorithm.
split_freq: FX SPLIT FREQ. Split selected images into low and high frequency parts.
solve_poisson:
FX SOLVE POISSON. Solve Poisson equation so that applying laplaciann is close to the result of laplacian_commandn. Solving is performed using a multi-scale gradient descent algorithm.
If nb_scales=0, the number of scales is automatically determined.
split_details:
FX SPLIT DETAILS. Split selected images into nb_scales detail scales. If base_scale = detail_scale = 0, the image decomposition is done with a trous wavelets.
Otherwise, it uses laplacian pyramids with linear standard deviations.
 nb_scales=0, base_scale=0 and detail_scale=0
structuretensors: FX STRUCTURETENSORS. Compute the structure tensor field of selected images.
solidify: FX SOLIDIFY. Solidify selected transparent images.
syntexturize: FX SYNTEXTURIZE. Resynthetize width'x'height versions of selected micro-textures by phase randomization.
syntexturize_matchpatch: FX SYNTEXTURIZE MATCHPATCH. Resynthetize width'x'height versions of selected micro-textures using a patch-matching algorithm.
tv_flow: FX TV FLOW. Apply iterations of the total variation flow on selected images.
unsharp: FX UNSHARP. Apply unsharp mask on selected images.
unsharp_octave: FX UNSHARP OCTAVE. Apply octave sharpening on selected images.
vanvliet: FX VANVLIET. Apply Vanvliet recursive filter on selected images, along specified axis and with
voronoi: FX VORONOI. Compute the discrete Voronoi diagram of non-zero pixels in selected images.
watermark_fourier: FX WATERMARK FOURIER. Add a textual watermark in the frequency domain of selected images.
array: FX ARRAY. Create MxN array from selected images. => Expand: 0=Min, 1=Max, 2=All;
array_fade: FX ARRAY FADE. Create MxN array from selected images. => Expand: 0=Min, 1=Max, 2=All;
array_mirror: FX ARRAY MIRROR. Create 2^Nx2^N array from selected images. => Expand: 0=X, 1=Y, 2=XY, 3=Tri-XY; => Expand: 0=No, 1=Yes;
array_random: FX ARRAY RANDOM. Create MdxNd array of tiles from selected MsxNs source arrays.
frame: FX FRAME. Insert outer frame in selected images, along the specified axes. => Axes: x, y, xy;
frame_blur: FX FRAME BLUR. Draw RGBA-colored round frame in selected images.
frame_cube: FX FRAME CUBE. Insert 3D frames in selected images. => Side: 0=Normal, 1=Mirror, 2=Mirror-X, 3=Mirror-Y, 4=Mirror-XY;
frame_fuzzy: FX FRAME FUZZY. Draw RGBA-colored fuzzy frame in selected images.
frame_pattern: FX FRAME PATTERNS. Insert selected pattern frame in selected images. => Constrain_size: 0=No, 1=Yes;
imagegrid: FX IMAGE GRID. Create MxN image grid from selected images.
imagegrid_hexagonal: FX IMAGEGRID HEXAGONAL. Create hexagonal grids from selected images. => Antialiased: 0=No, 1=Yes;
imagegrid_triangular: FX IMAGEGRID TRIANGULAR. Create triangular grids from selected images. => Pattern_type: 0=Horizontal, 1=Vertical, 2=Crossed, 3=Cube, 4:Decreasing, 5:Increasing;
rotate_tiles: FX ROTATE TILES. Apply MxN tiled-rotation effect on selected images.
shift_tiles: FX SHIFT TILES. Apply MxN tiled-shift effect on selected images.
taquin: FX TAQUIN. Create MxN taquin puzzle from selected images. => Remove_tile: 0=None, 1=First, 2=Last, 3=Random;
tunnel: FX TUNNEL. Apply tunnel effect on selected images.
channels: FX CHANNELS. Keep only specified channels of selected images. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
columns: FX COLUMNS. Keep only specified columns of selected images. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
crop: FX CROP. Crop selected images with specified region coordinates. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
expand: FX EXPAND. Expand selected images along the specified axes. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann; => Axis: 0=x, 1=y, 2=c, 3=xy, 4=xc, 5=yc, 6=xyc;
mirror: FX MIRROR. Mirror selected images along specified axes. => Axis: 0=x, 1=y, 2=xy;
rescale2d: FX RESCALE 2D. Resize selected 2D images while preserving aspect ratio. => Interpolate: 0=None, 1=Nearest, 2=Average, 3=Linear, 4=Grid, 5=Bicubic, 6=Lanczos; => Intermodal: 0=Inside, 1=Padded-inside, 2=Outside, 3=Cropped-outside;
resize_mn: FX RESIZE MN. Resize selected images with Mitchell-Netravali filter (cubic).
resize_pow2: FX RESIZE POW2. Resize selected images so that each dimension is a power of 2. => Interpolate: 0=None, 1=Nearest, 2=Average, 3=Linear, 4=Grid, 5=Bicubic, 6=Lanczos; => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
rotate: FX ROTATE. Rotate selected images with specified angle (in deg.), and optionally 3D axis (u,v,w). => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror; => Interpolation: 0=None, 1=Linear, 2=Bicubic;
rotate_tileable: FX ROTATE TILEABLE. Rotate selected images by specified angle and make them tileable.
rows: FX ROWS. Keep only specified rows of selected images. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
scale2x: FX SCALE 2X. Double XY-size of selected images, using the Scale2x algorithm.
scale3x: FX SCALE 3X. Triple XY-size of selected images, using the Scale3x algorithm.
scale_dcci2x: FX SCALE DCCI 2X. Double XY-size of selected images, using a directional cubic convolution interpolation. => Extend_1px: 0=No, 1=Yes;
seamcarve: FX SEAMCARVE. Resize selected images with specified 2D geometry, using the seam-carving algorithm. => Is_priority_channel: 0=No, 1=Yes; => Is_antialiasing: 0=No, 1=Yes;
shrink: FX SHRINK. Shrink selected images along the specified axes. => Axes: 0=x, 1=y, 2=c, 3=xy, 4=xc, 5=yc, 6=xyc; => Boundary: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann;
undistort: FX UNDISTORT. Correct barrel/pincushion distortions occurring with wide-angle lens. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
upscale_smart: FX UPSCALE SMART. Upscale selected images with an edge-preserving algorithm.
deform: FX DEFORM. Apply random smooth deformation on selected images. => Interpolation: 0=None, 1=Linear, 2=Bicubic; => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
euclidean2polar: FX EUCLIDEAN TO POLAR. Apply euclidean to polar transform on selected images.
equirectangular2nadirzenith: FX EQUIRECTANGULAR 2 NADIRZNITH. Transform selected equirectangular images to nadir/zenith rectilinear projections.
fisheye: FX FISHEYE. Apply fish-eye deformation on selected images.
flower: FX FLOWER. Apply flower deformation on selected images. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
kaleidoscope: FX KALEIDOSCOPE. Create kaleidoscope effect from selected images. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
map_sphere: FX MAP SPHERE. Map selected images on a sphere.
nadirzenith2equirectangular: FX NADIRZNITH TO EQUIRECTANGULAR. Transform selected nadir/zenith rectilinear projections to equirectangular images.
polar2euclidean: FX POLAR 2 EUCLIDEAN. Apply euclidean to polar transform on selected images. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
raindrops: FX RAINDROPS. Apply raindrops deformation on selected images.
ripple: FX RIPPLE. Apply ripple deformation on selected images. => Shape: 0=Block, 1=Triangle, 2=Sine, 3=Sine+, 4=Random;
rotoidoscope: FX ROTOIDOSCOPE. Create rotational kaleidoscope effect from selected images. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
spherize: FX SPHERIZE. Apply spherize effect on selected images. => Interpolation: 0=None, 1=Nearest, 2=Average, 3=Linear, 4=Grid, 5=Bicubic, 6=Lanczos;
symmetrize: FX SYMMETRIZE. Symmetrize selected images regarding specified axis. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror; => Antisymmetry: 0=No, 1=Yes; => Swap_sides: 0=No, 1=Yes;
transform_polar: FX TRANSFORM POLAR. Apply user-defined transform on polar representation of selected images. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
twirl: FX TWIRL. Apply twirl deformation on selected images. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
warp_perspective: FX WARP PERSPECTIVE. Warp selected images with perspective deformation. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;
water: FX WATER. Apply water deformation on selected images.
wave: FX WAVE. Apply wave deformation on selected images.
wind: FX WIND. Apply wind effect on selected images.
zoom: FX ZOOM. Apply zoom factor to selected images. => Boundaries: 0=Dirichlet, 1=Neumann, 2=Periodic, 3=Mirror;

4-1: Enable Realtime FX on Global FilePicker
Enable Realtime FX on Local FilePicker
